site.title: Yun Gang Shop
site.description: Yun Gang Shop is a vendor preparing to sell at TWBC. This site collects booth details, product information, and upcoming updates.

hero.title: Yun Gang Shop, a vendor preparing for TWBC
hero.intro: We are organizing booth details, planned products, and launch updates so visitors can quickly understand what Yun Gang Shop is preparing.
hero.profileTitle: Hello, we are Yun Gang Shop
hero.profileRole: TWBC Vendor / Product Prep / Booth Sales
hero.profileText: Yun Gang Shop is preparing to sell at TWBC. Product details, booth information, and updates will be collected here as the event gets closer.

about.title: Yun Gang Shop gathers the things we love into a booth of creative and practical goods, ready to meet everyone at TWBC.
about.body: This site will keep planned products, booth details, and future updates in one place. Whether visitors want to preview items before the event, check prices, or return later for new listings, they can quickly find Yun Gang Shop's latest information here.

footer.homeAria: Back to Yun Gang Shop home
footer.tagline: Preparing a vendor booth for TWBC
footer.quote: "Bring what we love to the booth, carefully."
